meta.title: Why Switzerland — The World's Premier Destination for Wealth, Security & Quality of Life
meta.description: Discover why Switzerland is the world's most trusted jurisdiction for wealth preservation, family security, and quality of life. 500+ years of neutrality, #1 private banking, world-class education.

hero.title: Why Switzerland
hero.subtitle: The world's premier destination for wealth preservation, security, and quality of life

neutrality.title: Political Neutrality
neutrality.subtitle: A sanctuary of stability in an uncertain world
neutrality.p1: Switzerland has maintained political neutrality for over 500 years — the longest period of any nation in modern history. It is not a member of NATO, the EU, or any military alliance. This neutrality is not passive: it is a deliberate, constitutionally enshrined policy that has survived two world wars, the Cold War, and every geopolitical upheaval of the modern era.
neutrality.p2: For wealth holders, this translates to an unparalleled guarantee: Switzerland has never confiscated private assets, never imposed emergency wealth levies, and never participated in the kind of political instability that jeopardises personal wealth in other jurisdictions. Your assets in Switzerland are protected by a legal and political framework that has stood for half a millennium.

banking.title: Banking & Wealth Management
banking.subtitle: The world's most trusted private banking system
banking.p1: Switzerland manages approximately CHF 7.9 trillion in assets, representing roughly 25% of all global cross-border private wealth. The Swiss banking system is regulated by FINMA, one of the world's most rigorous financial regulators, ensuring that your wealth is held to the highest standards of compliance and security.
banking.p2: Swiss private banks offer a level of personalised wealth management unmatched elsewhere. From multi-generational estate planning to sophisticated investment mandates, the depth of expertise available in Zurich, Geneva, and Zug is simply without parallel. For families transitioning wealth across borders, Switzerland offers the institutional infrastructure and discretion that other jurisdictions cannot guarantee.

education.title: Education System
education.subtitle: World-class learning for the next generation
education.p1: Switzerland is home to some of the finest educational institutions in the world. ETH Zurich consistently ranks among the top 3 universities globally, while the country's network of over 50 international schools — including Institut Le Rosey, Zuoz Academy, and the International School of Zug and Luzern — provides exceptional education for expatriate families.
education.p2: The Swiss education system combines academic rigour with multilingual immersion. Children attending international schools gain fluency in multiple languages while receiving IB, British, or American curricula. For families relocating from the Middle East, this represents an opportunity to provide children with a truly global education in one of the safest environments on earth.

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.subtitle: Among the finest healthcare systems in the world
healthcare.p1: Switzerland's healthcare system is consistently ranked among the best in the world. With mandatory universal coverage, world-leading hospitals, and a physician density that far exceeds most nations, residents have access to exceptional medical care. Major centres like Universitatsspital Zurich and Hirslanden provide cutting-edge treatments and executive health programmes.
healthcare.p2: For relocating families, Switzerland offers the peace of mind that comes with knowing your family's health is in the best possible hands. Executive health screening programmes, specialist physician networks, and seamless multilingual medical services ensure that healthcare is never a concern.

tax.title: Tax System
tax.subtitle: Competitive, transparent, and democratically protected
tax.p1: Switzerland's tax system benefits from a unique feature: cantonal competition. With 26 cantons setting their own tax rates, individuals and companies can choose locations that align with their financial objectives. Cantons like Zug and Schwyz offer some of the lowest personal and corporate tax rates in the developed world.
tax.p2: The lump-sum taxation regime (forfait fiscal) allows qualifying foreign nationals to be taxed on living expenses rather than worldwide income — a significant advantage for high-net-worth individuals. In November 2025, Swiss citizens voted 78% against introducing a federal wealth tax, reaffirming the country's commitment to protecting private wealth through democratic mandate.

qualityOfLife.title: Quality of Life
qualityOfLife.subtitle: Safety, infrastructure, and natural beauty without compromise
qualityOfLife.p1: Switzerland consistently ranks as the #1 country globally for quality of life. From the pristine Alpine landscapes to the immaculately maintained cities, every aspect of daily life reflects a commitment to excellence. The public transport system — connecting every village, town, and city — operates with legendary Swiss precision.
qualityOfLife.p2: Safety is not merely a statistic in Switzerland; it is a lived experience. Violent crime is virtually non-existent, personal security is taken for granted, and the social infrastructure — from parks and public spaces to cultural institutions — is maintained to the highest standard. For families relocating from regions with security concerns, Switzerland offers a transformation in daily quality of life.

business.title: Business Environment
business.subtitle: Where global commerce meets Swiss precision
business.p1: Switzerland offers one of the most business-friendly environments in the world. Company formation can be completed in as little as one to two weeks, intellectual property protection is the strongest globally, and the country's network of over 120 bilateral trade agreements provides seamless access to the EU single market and beyond.
business.p2: The Swiss workforce is among the most highly educated and productive in the world, with a strong tradition of discretion and professionalism. For entrepreneurs and family offices establishing operations in Switzerland, the combination of political stability, legal certainty, IP protection, and market access creates an unmatched foundation for business growth.

meta.title: Compare Swiss Cantons — Zurich vs Zug vs Schwyz for Relocation
meta.description: Interactive comparison of Zurich, Zug, and Schwyz cantons. Compare tax rates, lifestyle, international schools, banking, and real estate for your Swiss relocation.

hero.title: Canton Comparison
hero.subtitle: Choose the right Swiss canton for your family, business, and lifestyle

zurich.name: Zurich

lifestyle.culture: Opera, art galleries, Michelin-starred dining, lakefront living

zurich.bankingInfo: Home to UBS, Credit Suisse (now UBS), Julius Baer, and dozens of boutique private banks. Full-service crypto banking available (SEBA, Sygnum).

realEstate.lexKoller: Lex Koller applies: non-Swiss residents require authorization for residential property. B-permit holders may purchase primary residence.

bestFor.profile: The urban professional, digital entrepreneur, or family seeking world-class culture and connectivity
bestFor.ideal: Ideal for: crypto entrepreneurs, corporate executives, families valuing urban lifestyle

zug.name: Zug

lifestyle.international: Highly international (35%+ foreign residents, strong expat community)
lifestyle.culture: Elegant lakeside town, close to mountains and Zurich
lifestyle.transport: 30 minutes to Zurich Airport, excellent rail

list: International School of Zug and Luzern (ISZL)

zug.bankingInfo: Crypto Valley ecosystem with blockchain-native banks. Traditional private banking through local branches of major Swiss banks. Family office concentration second only to Geneva.

realEstate.lexKoller: Lex Koller applies. B-permit holders can purchase primary residence. Zug has additional local requirements for some communes.

bestFor.profile: The tax-optimising entrepreneur, family office, or crypto/fintech founder seeking the lowest possible tax burden
bestFor.ideal: Ideal for: family offices, forfait fiscal applicants, tech entrepreneurs

schwyz.name: Schwyz

lifestyle.culture: Alpine landscapes, lake views, traditional Swiss charm
lifestyle.transport: 45 minutes to Zurich Airport, scenic commute

list: International School of Zug and Luzern (Hünenberg campus, nearby)

schwyz.bankingInfo: Private banking through Schwyz-based cantonal bank and branches of major banks. Less institutional density than Zurich or Zug, but ideal for those valuing absolute privacy.

realEstate.lexKoller: Lex Koller applies. Generally more accessible pricing than Zurich or Zug with comparable or lower tax rates.

bestFor.profile: The privacy-focused family or individual seeking the lowest taxes with an Alpine lifestyle and complete discretion
bestFor.ideal: Ideal for: multi-generational families, privacy-focused individuals, retirees

meta.title: Client Case Studies — Move to Switzerland
meta.description: Anonymized case studies of successful Swiss relocations. Learn how entrepreneurs, families, and family offices navigate the journey to Switzerland.

hero.title: Client Journeys
hero.subtitle: Anonymized case studies from real relocations

caseStudiesPage.disclaimer: All case studies are anonymized. Names, identifying details, and specific figures have been altered to protect client confidentiality.

techFounder.title: The Tech Founder
techFounder.subtitle: Dubai to Zug in 9 months
techFounder.quote: We needed a jurisdiction that understood both our digital business model and our family's long-term security needs. Switzerland delivered on both.
techFounder.profile: Dubai-based tech entrepreneur, family of 4, post-exit with significant liquidity event

timeline.month3: Forfait fiscal negotiation initiated with Zug authorities
timeline.month6: Real estate acquisition — lakeside property in Zug
timeline.month9: Family office structure established, all services operational

challenges: Complex multi-jurisdictional corporate structure requiring restructuring
Crypto holdings requiring specialized banking documentation
techFounder.outcome: Full family relocation completed. Forfait fiscal approved. Children enrolled at ISZL. Family office operational with Swiss governance framework. Fee: undisclosed.

bankingFamily.title: The Banking Family
bankingFamily.subtitle: Beirut to Schwyz — emergency relocation
bankingFamily.quote: When the banks collapsed, we had 72 hours to make a decision. Our advisors had the Swiss infrastructure ready.
bankingFamily.profile: Lebanese family, 3 generations, significant banking and real estate portfolio, emergency circumstances

timeline.month2: Private banking onboarding (assets transferred from non-Lebanese holdings)
timeline.month9: Full settlement — all three generations established
timeline.month12: Ongoing retainer — estate management and succession planning

challenges: Emergency timeline requiring parallel processing of all workstreams
Assets trapped in Lebanese banking system
Three generations with different residency and care needs
bankingFamily.outcome: All three generations successfully relocated. Private banking relationships established. Estate restructured under Swiss governance. Ongoing succession planning retainer in place.

digitalNomad.title: The Digital Nomad
digitalNomad.subtitle: Riyadh to Zurich in 4 months
digitalNomad.quote: I needed a country that treated crypto as a legitimate asset class and offered real infrastructure for building a business. Zurich was the obvious choice.
digitalNomad.profile: 34-year-old Saudi national, significant cryptocurrency portfolio, active trader and investor, single

timeline.month1: Consultation, canton selection, crypto wealth documentation strategy
timeline.month15: B-permit application with detailed source-of-wealth documentation
timeline.month2: Company formation (Swiss GmbH) for consulting operations
timeline.month3: Crypto-friendly banking setup (SEBA Bank + traditional private bank)
timeline.month4: Apartment secured in Zurich, full relocation completed

challenges: Documenting crypto wealth chain from mining/early-stage purchases to current portfolio
Finding banking partners comfortable with 90%+ crypto-derived wealth
Navigating Swiss crypto tax classification for active trading vs. investment
B-permit for non-EU national with non-traditional wealth profile
digitalNomad.outcome: B-permit granted. Swiss GmbH operational. Dual banking relationship (crypto + traditional) established. Full compliance framework for ongoing crypto trading. 4 months start to finish.

gulfFamilyOffice.title: The Gulf Family Office
gulfFamilyOffice.subtitle: Kuwaiti family office — Swiss SFO established
gulfFamilyOffice.quote: We had wealth management in four jurisdictions, but no unified governance. Switzerland gave us the structure our family needed for the next generation.
gulfFamilyOffice.profile: Kuwaiti family office, CHF 200M+ AUM, multi-generational, operating across GCC, London, and Switzerland

timeline.month1: Scoping: governance audit, jurisdictional review, family charter assessment
timeline.month2: Swiss SFO structure designed — AG incorporated in Zug
timeline.month3: Board formation — 3 Swiss-resident independent directors placed
timeline.month4: Investment committee established, banking mandates restructured
timeline.month5: Governance framework documented and ratified by family council
timeline.month6: Operational — all reporting lines, compliance, and audit frameworks active
timeline.ongoing: Ongoing retainer: quarterly board meetings, annual governance review, ad-hoc advisory

challenges: Aligning governance expectations across three generations with different investment philosophies
Consolidating reporting from four jurisdictions into unified Swiss framework
Placing qualified independent directors who understood both Swiss and GCC business culture
Designing succession framework acceptable to all family branches
gulfFamilyOffice.outcome: Swiss SFO fully operational in Zug. 3 independent directors placed. Governance framework ratified by all family branches. Consolidated reporting across all jurisdictions. Ongoing retainer for quarterly governance and annual review.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive advisory across every dimension of your relocation
services.pageSubtitle: End-to-end advisory for your Swiss relocation

assetStructuring.title: Pre-Immigration Asset Structuring
assetStructuring.description: Realising gains before Swiss residency; restructuring shareholdings, trusts, and UAE corporate structures; comprehensive source-of-wealth documentation.
assetStructuring.detail: We work with your existing advisors to ensure your asset structure is optimised before you establish Swiss tax residency. This includes reviewing shareholdings, trust arrangements, and corporate structures in the UAE and beyond, ensuring clean source-of-wealth documentation that satisfies Swiss banking and tax authority requirements.

lumpSum.title: Lump-Sum Taxation (Forfait Fiscal)
lumpSum.description: Full negotiation of cantonal tax ruling; taxable base determination; ongoing annual compliance management.
lumpSum.detail: Switzerland's lump-sum taxation regime offers qualifying individuals a tax base calculated on living expenses rather than worldwide income. We handle the complete negotiation with cantonal authorities, determine the optimal taxable base, and manage ongoing annual compliance to ensure your arrangement remains in good standing.

residency.title: Residency & Immigration
residency.description: Canton selection advisory; B-permit application management; family inclusion planning; pathway to C-permit and citizenship.
residency.detail: Choosing the right canton is perhaps the most consequential decision in your relocation. We advise on canton selection based on your tax situation, lifestyle preferences, and family needs. We then manage the full B-permit application, family inclusion, and map the pathway to C-permit and eventual Swiss citizenship.

companyFormation.title: Company Formation & Corporate Structuring
companyFormation.description: Swiss holding companies; IP structures; coordination with UAE entities; VAT registration and compliance.
companyFormation.detail: Whether you need a Swiss holding company, an IP licensing structure, or coordination between your existing UAE entities and new Swiss operations, we handle the entire process. This includes VAT registration, corporate compliance, and ensuring your corporate structure is both tax-efficient and fully compliant.

familyOffice.title: Family Office Establishment
familyOffice.description: Single and multi-family office advisory; private banking introductions; trust and foundation structuring; succession planning.
familyOffice.detail: For families requiring dedicated wealth management infrastructure, we advise on establishing single or multi-family offices in Switzerland. This includes introductions to leading private banks, structuring trusts and foundations for asset protection, and comprehensive succession planning that accounts for cross-border complexities.

directorship.title: Independent Directorship & Board Services
directorship.description: Swiss-resident director placement; corporate secretarial services; governance and compliance support.
directorship.detail: Many Swiss corporate structures require a Swiss-resident director. We provide qualified independent directors, corporate secretarial services, and ongoing governance support to ensure your Swiss entities meet all regulatory requirements while you focus on your business.

realEstate.title: Real Estate Advisory
realEstate.description: Lex Koller navigation; access to off-market properties; acquisition structuring; notary coordination.
realEstate.detail: Swiss real estate regulations, particularly the Lex Koller restrictions on foreign buyers, require expert navigation. We provide access to off-market properties across premium locations, structure acquisitions to comply with all regulations, and coordinate with notaries to ensure smooth transactions.

privateBanking.title: Private Banking & Wealth Management
privateBanking.description: Bank selection advisory; AML/KYC preparation; crypto wealth documentation; investment mandate structuring.
privateBanking.detail: Opening a Swiss private banking relationship requires careful preparation. We advise on bank selection based on your specific needs, prepare all AML/KYC documentation including crypto wealth substantiation, and help structure investment mandates that align with your wealth management objectives.

health.title: Health & Wellness Concierge
health.description: Mandatory health insurance setup; specialist physician introductions; executive health screening; medical liaison.
health.detail: Switzerland's healthcare system requires mandatory insurance and can be complex to navigate. We set up your health insurance, introduce you to leading specialist physicians, arrange executive health screenings, and serve as your ongoing medical liaison to ensure you and your family receive the finest care.

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle Coordination & Soft Landing
lifestyle.description: International school placement; domestic staff permits; spouse integration programmes; community introductions; cultural orientation.
lifestyle.detail: The success of your relocation extends far beyond paperwork. We handle international school placement for your children, domestic staff work permits, spouse integration and community introductions, and comprehensive cultural orientation to ensure your entire family feels at home in Switzerland from day one.

clients.title: Who We Serve
clients.subtitle: Our advisory is tailored to your specific profile and objectives

entrepreneur.title: The Established Entrepreneur
entrepreneur.description: Pre-exit or post-exit business owners seeking to establish Swiss residency before a liquidity event. Typical engagement: 12–24 months.

family.title: The Relocating Family
family.description: Families prioritising security, education, and quality of life. Comprehensive relocation including schools, healthcare, and community integration.

youngWealth.title: The Younger Wealth Holder
youngWealth.description: Digital entrepreneurs and crypto wealth holders seeking a stable, crypto-friendly jurisdiction with world-class lifestyle.

familyOffice.title: The Gulf Family Office
familyOffice.description: Established family offices seeking a European governance hub, succession planning, and institutional-grade wealth structuring.

founders.title: The Founders
founders.subtitle: Two decades of combined Swiss advisory expertise

adrian.name: Adrian Burgi
adrian.bio: Swiss attorney and MBA graduate. Adrian has established multiple banks in Switzerland and maintains deep relationships with FINMA, private banking institutions, and cantonal authorities. His legal expertise and institutional network form the regulatory backbone of our advisory.

robin.name: Robin Roy Krigslund-Hansen
robin.bio: Danish serial entrepreneur based in Switzerland. With over CHF 400 million in managed digital advertising and multiple companies across Switzerland and the EU, Robin brings operational excellence and a deep understanding of cross-border business structuring. Speaks German, Danish, and English.

about.pageSubtitle: Independence, confidentiality, and depth of service

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Move to Switzerland was founded on a simple observation: high-net-worth individuals relocating from the Middle East to Switzerland face an unnecessarily fragmented advisory landscape. Tax advisors, immigration lawyers, real estate agents, and private bankers each operate in isolation, leaving the client to coordinate between them.
story.p2: We created a single point of contact that orchestrates the entire relocation journey — from pre-immigration asset structuring through to your children's first day at school. Our founders combine deep Swiss legal and banking expertise with practical entrepreneurial experience in cross-border operations.
story.p3: Every engagement is handled with the discretion and thoroughness our clients expect. We serve a limited number of families at any given time, ensuring each receives our undivided attention.

independence.title: Independence
independence.description: We are not tied to any bank, law firm, or real estate agency. Our advice is always in your best interest.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.description: Every engagement is protected by strict confidentiality. We never disclose client relationships or details.

depth.title: Depth of Service
depth.description: We don't refer and forget. We stay with you through every step, from first consultation to full settlement.

contact.confidential: All inquiries are treated with strict confidentiality.

form.name: Full Name
form.hearAbout: How did you hear about us? (optional)
form.success: Thank you. Your inquiry has been received. We will respond within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

privacy.content: This privacy policy explains how Move to Switzerland collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with Swiss data protection law (nDSG) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

footer.tagline: Premium relocation advisory for distinguished individuals and families.
footer.disclaimer: The services are limited to general financial education and strategic guidance and do not constitute financial services within the meaning of the Financial Services Act (FIDLEG). In particular, no advice on specific financial instruments, no portfolio management and no execution or transmission of orders is provided
